abs.description: The Absolute function returns the absolute value of its input: abs(X)

add.description: The Add function adds two same type values: A+B

and.description: The And function returns true if the two boolean entries values are true: A&B

and.title: And

atan2.description:
The Arc tangent 2 function returns the angle in radians between the 2D vector Vector and the horizontal. (No need to switch x and y as in the usual atan2 function.)
It is the reciprocal of the Cartesian function

outputs.description:
The Arc tangent 2 function returns the angle in radians between the 2D vector Vector and the horizontal. (No need to switch x and y as in the usual atan2 function.)
It is the reciprocal of the Cartesian function

atan2.title: Arc tangent 2

bitmap.description: Loads a bitmap resource into the graph.

parameters.description: The Output size parameter defines the horizontal and vertical size of the output image as a power of 2. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Output format parameter sets the output image format. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The Pixel size parameter defines the horizontal and vertical size of a pixel. This parameter is used by the non-local filters: Blur, Sharpen, Transformation 2D, Directional blur, and Directional warp. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The Pixel ratio parameter defines the behavior of the pixel size's aspect ratio with respect to the output size's aspect ratio. The parameter is used by non-local filters. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Tiling mode parameter defines the input’s tiling behavior. The parameter is used by the non-local filters. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The Random seed parameter defines the random seed of the filter node. This parameter is used by all random generators. Random seed is cumulative if the inherited qualifier is set. The final random seed is the sum of the random seeds of all of filters of its hierarchy. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Color mode parameter toggles between a grayscale and a color output image
The PKG resource path parameter displays the bitmap's location in your package
The Resize method parameter select how the bitmap is resized if required

outputs.description: Output connector

bitmap.title: Bitmap

blend.description: Combines two images using a specified blending mode and an optional mask.

parameters.description: The Output size parameter defines the horizontal and vertical size of the output image as a power of 2. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Output format parameter sets the output image format. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The Tiling mode parameter defines the input’s tiling behavior. The parameter is used by the non-local filters. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The Random seed parameter defines the random seed of the filter node. This parameter is used by all random generators. Random seed is cumulative if the inherited qualifier is set. The final random seed is the sum of the random seeds of all of filters of its hierarchy. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Opacity parameter sets the transparency of the blend
The Blending mode parameter defines the blending operation used to combine the foreground and background images
The Alpha blending parameter defines the how alpha channels of color source and destination are interpreted
The Cropping area parameter applies a cropping area on the foreground input

inputs.description: Input 1 color or grayscale image
Input 2 color or grayscale image
Optional opacity input: per-pixel blending result mask

outputs.description: Output connector

cartesian.description:
The Cartesian function converts polar coordinates to Cartesian coordinates. (Polar coordinates are a distance from the origin and an angle in radians from the horizontal.)
It is the reciprocal of the Arc tangent 2 function: Length × Float2(cos(Angle), sin(Angle))

outputs.description:
The Cartesian function converts polar coordinates to Cartesian coordinates. (Polar coordinates are a distance from the origin and an angle in radians from the horizontal.)
It is the reciprocal of the Arc tangent 2 function: Length × Float2(cos(Angle), sin(Angle))

cartesian.title: Cartesian

fxmaps.description: Builds procedural noises and patterns by following the instructions of an FX-Map graph.

parameters.description: The Output size parameter defines the horizontal and vertical size of the output image as a power of 2. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Output format parameter sets the output image format. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

The final random seed is the sum of the random seeds of all of filters of its hierarchy. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value
The Color mode parameter toggles between a grayscale and a color output image
The Render region parameter sets the region to render (left, right, top, bottom)

Activate Cull outside parameter in order to discard all patterns w/ centers outside the tiling region
The Roughness parameter calculates the roughness value (depth and opacity multiplier). It applies a bias to the FX-Map's blending process
The Global opacity parameter is an opacity multiplier applied to each FX-Map's patterns

The Random seed parameter defines the random seed of the filter node. This parameter is used by all random generators. Random seed is cumulative if the inherited qualifier is set. The final random seed is the sum of the random seeds of all of filters of its hierarchy. Parameter can be inherited from parent object, or set to an absolute value

while.description:
The While loop node will execute the Init branch once, then iterate over the Exit cond. and Loop body branches until the Exit cond. branch returns true
Nodes connected to the Exit cond. and Loop body branches cannot be connected to other branches of the graph.
Loops have an implicit maximum number of iterations which can be disabled by setting it to -1.

outputs.description:
The While loop node will execute the Init branch once, then iterate over the Exit cond. and Loop body branches until the Exit cond. branch returns true
Nodes connected to the Exit cond. and Loop body branches cannot be connected to other branches of the graph.
Loops have an implicit maximum number of iterations which can be disabled by setting it to -1.

while.title: While loop
